name: ARMSTRONG WORLD INDUSTRIES INC
summary: PART I Armstrong World Industries, Inc. (AWI or the Company) is a Pennsylvania corporation incorporated in 1891. When we refer to we, our and us in this report, we are referring to AWI and its subsidiaries. AWI is an Americas leader in the design and manufacture of innovative interior and exterior architectural applications including ceilings, specialty walls and exterior metal solutions.
